custom_css: Header .title-3d{font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:#fff!important;text-shadow:0 1px 0 #009b3a,0 2px 0 #ffdf00,0 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.5)!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;gap:10px!important}header .title-3d::before{content:none!important}header button{background:#002776!important;border:2px solid #ffdf00!important;border-radius:8px!important;color:#fff!important}aside .btn-pulse,#main-fire-btn{background:linear-gradient(45deg,#009b3a,#ffdf00,#009b3a)!important;color:#002776!important;font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;border-radius:12px!important;text-shadow:0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.3)!important;box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(0,155,58,0.4)!important;animation:brilho-copa 3s infinite!important;background-size:200% 200%!important}#main-fire-btn:active,aside .btn-pulse:active{transform:scale(0.96)!important;filter:brightness(1.2)!important}@keyframes brilho-copa{0%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}}#streak-input{background:#001a0e!important;border:1px solid #009b3a!important;color:#fff!important;border-radius:8px!important}.tab-btn.active{color:#ffdf00!important}.tab-btn.active::after{background:#ffdf00!important;height:3px!important}.item-card.selected-card{border-color:#002776!important;box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(0,39,118,0.3)!important}
